headline: FDA Issued Emergency Use Authorization For Dectomax/Dectomax-CA1 (Doramectin Injection) Injectable Solution; Issues Emergency Use Authorization For Over-The-Counter Injectable Drug For New World Screwworm In Dairy Cattle, Horses, Swine, Sheep, And Deer

headline: Zoetis Inc (NYSE:ZTS): A Dividend Growth Stock with Strong Profitability and Attractive Valuation
summary: Zoetis offers a strong dividend growth history and top profitability, with a 1.64% yield and P/E of 12.01, making it an attractive value play for income-focused investors.
